name: Real arXiv CS Citations (2024)
description: 285 real citations extracted from two 2024 arXiv CS papers. Ground truth: all VALID.

name: Real CrossRef Random Sample
description: 100 real citations from CrossRef random API sample across disciplines. Ground truth: all VALID.

name: Frankenstein Citations
description: 100 synthetic fakes: real author + real journal + fabricated title. Tests metadata cross-checking.

name: Stolen DOI Citations
description: 100 synthetic fakes: real DOI paired with completely wrong metadata. Tests DOI-to-metadata comparison.

name: Plausible Fake Citations
description: 100 synthetic fakes: entirely fabricated but realistic-looking. Tests ability to detect without any matching real paper.

name: Nonsense Citations
description: 100 synthetic fakes: obviously wrong (future years, fake DOIs, impossible metadata). Baseline sanity check.

name: Nature Article References
description: 10 references cited by the Nature article that inspired this tool. Tests validator on real but sparse metadata.

name: Nature Article — Frankenstein Examples
description: AI-fabricated Frankenstein citations featured in the Nature article. Generated by GPT-4o in a study of mental health literature reviews. Every component (author, journal, DOI prefix) is real; the combination is fake.

name: Compound Deception — NeurIPS 2025 Fakes
description: 100 AI-fabricated citations found in 53 accepted NeurIPS 2025 papers. 5-category taxonomy: Total Fabrication (66%), Partial Corruption (27%), Identifier Hijacking (4%).

name: HalluCitation — ACL/NAACL/EMNLP Fakes
description: ~300 papers with hallucinated references from ACL, NAACL, and EMNLP 2024-2025. Appendix B lists specific papers.

name: BibTeX Hallucinations Benchmark
description: 931-paper benchmark across 4 domains with ~23,000 field-level observations. Only 50.9% of LLM BibTeX fully correct.

name: GhostCite — Real Paper Citations
description: Sample from 2.2M real citations in 56,381 papers (2020-2025). Large-scale false-positive baseline.

name: Mysterious Citations — HPC Conferences
description: Citations from 4 HPC conferences comparing 2021 vs 2025. Source of Nature's 2-6% headline figure.

name: CiteAudit — Human-Validated Citation Benchmark
description: 9,442 citations (6,475 real + 2,967 fake) with human-validated labels. Multi-domain (ML, biology, chemistry). First open standardized benchmark for hallucinated citation detection.
